shortDescription: Charming Victorian semi-detached in trendy Ossington Village with original character details and a modern rear addition.
fullDescription: This lovingly maintained Victorian semi sits on one of Toronto's most vibrant streets. The home seamlessly blends period charm — including original crown mouldings, stained glass transoms, and a decorative fireplace — with a stunning contemporary rear addition featuring a wall of glass opening onto the garden. The main floor flows from a formal living room through to a bright eat-in kitchen with butcher-block counters and matte-black fixtures. Three bedrooms on the upper level include a primary with skylight and updated four-piece bathroom. The unfinished basement offers excellent potential for additional living space. A rear laneway provides one parking spot. Surrounded by acclaimed restaurants, boutiques, galleries, and Trinity Bellwoods Park.
keyFeatures: Original Victorian details: crown mouldings and stained glass
Modern rear addition with floor-to-ceiling glass
Three bedrooms with skylight in primary
Thriving Ossington strip at your doorstep
